concerns.text: Success Criteria IDs skip SC-013. Sequence goes SC-011 → SC-012 → SC-014. This creates a broken identifier chain and potential cross-reference ambiguity. Either renumber SC-014 to SC-013 or document the gap explicitly.

FR-003 specifies '≥90% match threshold' for algorithm validation, but SC-012 uses 'high match threshold' without the same numerical precision. Inconsistent terminology for the same requirement creates ambiguity about the actual success criterion.

Inconsistent terminology: 'hyperbolic volume' (research question) vs 'complete hyperbolic volume data' (FR-014) vs 'hyperbolic volume data completeness' (SC-014). Should standardize to one phrase throughout for traceability.

FR-007 references 'exploratory validation sample' but uses 'assess correlation' while FR-006's composite score is marked OPTIONAL (SHOULD). If FR-006 is not implemented, FR-007 becomes N/A but the requirement text doesn't explicitly state this dependency in the MUST/SHOULD language itself.
